home.description: Full-stack software engineer focused on Java, Spring Boot, and React, currently working at Impulsa Dirección de Proyectos. Passionate about building secure, user-centric applications with scalable architectures.

about.title: About Me
about.intro: I'm <1>Ricardo Carreño</1>, a Software Engineering graduate. I currently work at Impulsa Dirección de Proyectos, combining software development with technical documentation and project support.
about.goal: My goal is to design digital experiences that are elegant for the user and resilient for the business, with a special interest in cybersecurity and automation.
about.learning: Currently expanding my cybersecurity and architecture training, with active preparation for the CompTIA Security+ certification.

contact.title: Let's Talk
